items.title: Lu Dort was the longest-tenured Thunder player. His signing was 4 days before The Paul George Trade was official, though he’d agreed to the deal on draft night.
items.author: Jon Hamm
items.body_excerpt:
Lu Dort was the longest-tenured Thunder player. His signing was 4 days before The Paul George Trade was official, though he’d agreed to the deal on draft night. 

In some ways, he’s a relic from the old days. Brought in with PG and Russ in mind. Became a core piece of a rebuilt core.

images.alt:
July 6, 2019
Signed Luguentz Dort to a two-way contract.

items.title: One part of Tyler Marsh's postgame response stood out to me:
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
One part of Tyler Marsh's postgame response stood out to me:

"I, and we, know what we fight for behind the scenes, whether it's within our organization or elsewhere."

An interesting comment given everything that's surrounded the Sky this season.

items.title: For the third time this season, the Sky’s bid for a third straight win comes up short.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
For the third time this season, the Sky’s bid for a third straight win comes up short.

After trailing by as many as 22 points, the Sky outscored Atlanta 27-13 in the third quarter,  took their first lead early in the fourth and had a chance to win until the final possession.

items.title: Random POTD Adam Morrison. Star SF at Gonzaga was drafted 3rd by CHA in 06. Scored 12 ppg as a rook but was not efficient. Missed 07-08 w/ACL tear. Traded to LAL in 08-09 where he sat on a title team. Waived in 2010 & played briefly abroad. Now, like everyone else, has a pod.
